steps.detail: Spawned backend agent (sonnet/high) for tasks: bd6df00c593b

task_snapshots.title: [RETRY 1] 333d-03: Agent exit logic for rebalancing
task_snapshots.description:
[retry:1] Implement agent exit triggers when a role has no more open tasks. Prevents idle agent accumulation.

- If role.tasks == 0 and agent.active, agent should exit gracefully
- Check every tick: if a role has more agents than tasks, do not spawn more
- Ensure clean shutdown without orphaning tasks

[subtask of 15d83a329576]

**Completion signal**: Agents exit when their role queue empties; test shows idle agents don't linger after task completion.
